description: Style NoteDesigned for that absolute comfort during work outs, these skin tight leggings from ADIDAS are created using materials that ensure you have a fresh and comfortable feel throughout the day. Engineered using a soft, stretchable fabric, the leggings stay snug and comfortably on the body while the shimmery embroidered brand logo adds a sense of style. If you wish to go casual, simply pair them with lifestyle shoes and a long, stylish top.Product DetailsADIDAS long blue leggings with a soft and broad elastic waist and embroidered shimmery logo on left thighMaterial and Care95% cotton and 5% lycraMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanLine dry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
